items.title: 'I thought I was going to die' - Venezuelans describe earthquake panic
items.summary: Buildings were flattened in the capital Caracas, where voices have been heard calling from the rubble.

items.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
items.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

items.title: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
items.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 赴韓注意！日本「2款夯藥」列管制 入境秒沒收+留刑事紀錄
items.summary: 許多台灣民眾前往日本旅遊時，會去藥妝店購買成藥「EVE止痛藥」或「大正百保能感冒藥」回國。對此，一名在南韓擔任領隊的男子提醒，這2款成藥在南韓已被列為管制藥品，禁止攜帶入境，如果...…

items.title: 被烏軍無人機打怕了  俄防空系統大舉移防首都、普廷官邸
items.summary: 烏克蘭近日頻頻打擊俄羅斯境內目標，甚至遠及距離邊境逾2000公里。烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基25日表示，隨著烏軍長程無人機持續深入痛擊俄國目標，莫斯科正將顯著數量的防空系統，移防至少數...…

items.title: 香港首位！AV女優素海霖驚傳遭逮捕  最重恐判7年、罰2千多萬！
items.summary: 港產AV女優素海霖（原名蘇凱琳）今天（25日）驚傳因涉嫌為境外非法賭博網站擔任代言人遭逮捕，引發大批老司機討論。  綜合港媒報導，西九龍總區重案組人員最近調查，某非法賭博網站...…
